investigate.description: Investigates bugs with a root-cause-first debugging workflow before making fixes.

plan-eng-review.description: Reviews an implementation plan for architecture, edge cases, test coverage, and performance before coding starts.

ship.description: Runs a structured ship workflow: assess branch state, verify readiness, prepare a gitmoji commit, and create a PR or shipping-ready output.

qa.description: Runs browser-oriented QA workflows, triages issues, and fixes app bugs when the required QA adapter is configured.

qa-only.description: Runs browser-oriented QA in report-only mode without making code changes.

review.description: Reviews current work for bugs, regressions, and missing tests.
